summary: Frontend testing completed successfully for Wildlife Reserve Booking System. All requested features are working correctly: booking widget tabs, date pickers, guest selector, Check Availability scroll, Book Stay navigation, and interactive map with region filters.

booking_widget_tabs.details: All three tabs (Rooms Only, Safari Only, Rooms + Safari) work correctly with proper visual feedback

date_pickers.details: Check-in and check-out date pickers present with correct default values (tomorrow and day after)

guest_selector.details: Guest dropdown works correctly, allows selection from 1-10 guests

check_availability_scroll.details: Check Availability button correctly scrolls from position 0 to map section (position 988)

book_stay_navigation.details: Book Stay nav link navigates to homepage from other pages and scrolls to top when on homepage

interactive_map.details: Leaflet map loads with 25 markers, all markers clickable with popup showing location details

region_filters.details: Region filters work correctly - Theppakadu(5), Kargudi(2), Abhayaranyam(2), Masinagudi(4), Genepool(12)

book_this_stay_button.details: Book This Stay button in location details panel scrolls back to booking widget

back_to_booking_button.details: Back to Booking button below map section scrolls to top

context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking widget integration into homepage carousel is complete and working. All scroll behaviors, navigation links, and interactive map features are functional. The old /interactive-map-booking route has been removed and Book Stay nav now correctly scrolls to the homepage booking widget.
